CustomField.description: IF(OR(AND(spot__c ,SalesPeriod__c != ThisPeriod__c ) , ISPICKVAL(Phase__c, '撤退')) ,0 ,IF ( ThisPeriod__c - SalesPeriod__c = 0 ,IF (Month(Today()) < 7 , RemainingEstimateAmount__c * (7- Month(Today())) /12 , RemainingEstimateAmount__c * (19- Month(Today())) /12) ,IF ( ThisPeriod__c - SalesPeriod__c = 1 , RemainingEstimateAmount__c , 0)))
CustomField.formula: IF( OR(SalesPeriod__c = ThisPeriod__c) ,IF (spot__c ,RemainingEstimateAmount__c ,IF (Month(occur_revenu_month__c) < 7 , RemainingEstimateAmount__c * (7- Month(occur_revenu_month__c)) /12 , RemainingEstimateAmount__c * (19- Month(occur_revenu_month__c)) /12)) ,0 )
CustomField.label: 今期売上想定額
